text.title: task-agent-fixable-triage-gate Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for task-agent-fixable-triage-gate as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: The triage bot has Edit/Write tools "to also fix typos in the issue body" — same identity that applies the label.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Conflating triage and coding identities defeats the audit trail; the label loses its meaning as a human-or-equivalent decision.

failure-mode.description: Letting humans apply both agent-fixable AND agent:devin together "to save the router a step".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Humans don't track agent availability or vendor outages; pinning the vendor at triage time breaks fleet rebalancing and surfaces incidents as "ticket stuck on Devin queue while Copilot is idle".
